positive: A vibrant, stylized celestial forest panorama featuring glowing bioluminescent flora, crystalized fungi, and graceful, abstract cosmic fauna (like glowing celestial moths and gentle winged spirits). The style is neo-art nouveau combined with cosmic vaporwave aesthetics, rendered as a complex, high-contrast linework illustration with strong silhouettes. Central composition, highly detailed yet clean for printing, featuring jewel tones (deep sapphire, emerald green, amethyst) contrasted with neon gold and pure white glow. Ink drawing, vector art quality, symmetrical composition, highly aesthetic, perfect for t-shirt print.
negative: blurry, bokeh, low contrast, washed out, gradient, logo, watermark, text, signature, copyright, messy, cropped, out of focus, extra limbs, poor anatomy, artifact, noise, jpeg artifacts, bad composition
